creator: Evan Coyne Maloney
description: A moving memorial in observance of the five year anniversary of the September 11th attacks. This video tells the story of September 11, 2001 through fire and ambulance radio calls, the 911 call of a trapped World Trade Center worker, and the lens of local resident who saw an explosion while walking to work.
